title: Compact Spherical Tokamak Fusion Reactor
physics_insight: The feedback control applies magnetic counter-pulses 10,000x per second using room-temperature LaLuH6 superconductor coils. This damps kink and ballooning instabilities before they grow, achieving LAMINAR plasma flow. Combined with (Hf,Ta,Zr,Nb)C first wall that survives plasma contact, this enables steady-state Q>10 operation in a shipping-container-sized reactor.
